_schema.description: B19 — Cross-feature invariants matrix. Each entry declares a system invariant that must hold across mutations. Pure-function invariants are tested via fast-check property tests in src/test/invariants/. DB-integration invariants require a test Supabase branch and are marked integration:true.

fields.name: Stable identifier used in test names and audit logs
fields.source_tables: Tables involved in computing this invariant
fields.mutation_triggers: Code paths that can violate this invariant if buggy
fields.pure_function: Path to the deterministic function expressing this invariant, if extractable
fields.integration: true if requires DB/RLS to test end-to-end
fields.negative_test: Description of the deliberate-violation case that should be rejected

invariants.name: budget_rollup_sum
invariants.rule: For every division: revised_budget_cents = original_budget_cents + sum(approved_change_orders.amount_cents).
invariants.negative_test: Insert a budget_items row with budget_cents that breaks the sum; expect API rejection or CHECK constraint denial.

invariants.name: retainage_release_cap
invariants.rule: For every pay application: cumulative retainage_released_cents <= cumulative retainage_withheld_cents.
invariants.negative_test: Attempt to release more retainage than withheld; expect validation error.

invariants.name: schedule_critical_path_monotonic
invariants.rule: For every schedule_activity in the critical path: predecessor.end_date <= activity.start_date.
invariants.negative_test: Force-move an activity to overlap its predecessor; expect dependency engine to reject.

invariants.name: daily_log_crew_hours_cap
invariants.negative_test: Submit attendance entries totaling >24h for one crew on one date; expect rejection.

invariants.name: cost_code_total_consistency
invariants.rule: For every (project_id, cost_code) tuple: budget_items_total_cents = sum(daily_log_costs + change_order_costs) tagged with that code.
invariants.negative_test: Tag a daily_log_entry with a cost code that has no budget_item; reconciliation report flags drift.

invariants.name: punch_zone_completion
invariants.rule: A punch zone marks `completed_at` only when every punch_item.status = 'verified'.
invariants.negative_test: Set zone.completed_at while one punch_item.status = 'open'; expect domain rule to revert.
